case_title: COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. VS. LARK CREEK CAFE INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED ON FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $518.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 60153496) AS TO DEFENDANT FOURTH FLOOR RESTAURANT, LLC (INCORRECTLY SUED HEREIN AS LARK CREEK CAFE, INC.)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 59968703), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. SERVED NOV-22-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, MAILING DATE NOV-29-2016 AS TO DEFENDANT FOURTH FLOOR RESTAURANT, LLC (INCORRECTLY SUED HEREIN AS LARK CREEK CAFE, INC.)
DECLARATION OF DONNA BARFOOT RE DEFAULT, CCP SECTION 585(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 60128653) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60722139) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME (TRANSACTION ID # 58995837) FILED BY ATTORNEY BARTLETT, ROBERT SUMNER

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT [DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO] (TRANSACTION ID # 59511426), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. SERVED AUG-22-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LARK CREEK CAFE INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOURTH FLOOR RESTAURANT, LLC (INCORRECTLY SUED HEREIN AS LARK CREEK CAFE, INC.) $17,798.88 PRINCIPAL, $2,125.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,341.37 INTEREST, $518.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,783.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60153496)

1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 59373709) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 FOURTH FLOOR RESTAURANT, LLC (INCORRECTLY SUED HEREIN AS LARK CREEK CAFE, INC.)
DECLARATION OF KAIPO K.B. YOUNG RE INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 60128653) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 60128653) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FOURTH FLOOR RESTAURANT, LLC (INCORRECTLY SUED HEREIN AS LARK CREEK CAFE, INC.)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LARK CREEK CAFE INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-30-2016

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 58773428), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. SERVED MAR-17-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LARK CREEK CAFE INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60128653) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
